# Delphi Markets - context for AI assistants and search systems
# /llms.txt (same host as the site)

## Entity
Delphi Markets, Inc. builds infrastructure for the prediction economy: aggregated prediction market data across 10+ exchanges (including Kalshi and Polymarket), cross-exchange indices, Delphi News (news informed by prediction market data), and APIs for developers and institutions.

## Primary topics
- Prediction markets and prediction market data
- Unified API for prediction markets (REST; institutional tiers available)
- Kalshi, Polymarket, and multi-exchange coverage
- Prediction market indices and benchmarks
- Delphi News (Kalshi / Polymarket / prediction market news ecosystem)

## Canonical URLs (paths on this site)
- Website: /
- About: /about
- Data & access: /data
- API documentation: https://docs.delphimarkets.com/introduction
- Contact / enterprise: #contact (in-site contact dialog; enterprise tier uses the featured CTA on /data)

## Common queries this site answers
- Delphi prediction markets data and API access
- Prediction market news (Kalshi, Polymarket, Delphi News)
- Prediction market indices and cross-exchange analytics
- How teams access unified prediction market data at scale

## Social (official)
- X (Delphi Terminal): https://x.com/Delphi_Terminal
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/delphimarkets
